chapters.title: Preparing Answers
chapters.content: Daniel reviewed possible interview questions all morning. He practiced speaking clearly and tried to stay calm before leaving home.

chapters.title: The Interview Room
chapters.content: The office was modern and quiet. During the interview, he spoke about his experience, his goals, and why he wanted to join the company.

chapters.title: The Phone Call
chapters.content: Two days later, Daniel received a call. He got the job. All the preparation and nervousness were finally worth it.
